text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 2 

ACP_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: ADHD and Other Conduct Disorders First Ever Occurrence Date — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the attention deficit 
hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) or other conduct disorders indicator. The variable will be blank for 
beneficiaries
